title: Pokeloader
description: Displays the iconic Pokeball on game startup with some satisfying audio as well.
body:
# Pokeloader
This is Pokeloader! It's a mod that displays a Pokemon themed animation on game startup before the Mojang Studios logo appeaars.
### Compatibility
This mod is currently exclusive to the Fabric mod loader, and I'm trying to develop a NeoForge port, however, success has been limited and therefore I cannot predict support for other modloaders.

Dependencies for this mod's functionality vary by version:
#### 1.19.4 - Present
You will need [YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) in order to reach the mod's configuration menus, you will also need [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (or a suitable alternative).
#### 1.19.3 and older
Builds for 1.19.3 and older are considered legacy and will recieve limited support. If you plan to use them you will need [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) and [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (or a suitable alternative) in order to recieve the full functionality these builds provide.
### Support, Bugs, and Issues
If you are having issues with the mod or have encountered a bug please report it on my GitHub repository so I can most effectively patch it.
### Noteworthy Disclaimer
This is my first operational Minecraft Mod, so the functionality, maintaining, and reliability of this mod should be taken with a grain of salt. Just saying!
